items.name: LV Trunkie Bag
items.description:
This shoulder bag is crafted of LV coated canvas with black leather trim. It features gold rivets, a half leather threaded chain-link shoulder strap, and metal corners. The flap has an S-lock clasp closure that opens to a black microfiber interior with a zipper pocket.

More at: https://www.roblox.com/communities/128035271/Dakus-Bags#!/about

The ultimate destination for the most unique and high-quality UGC items on Roblox! We specialize in bringing your favorite styles to life with professional designs that make your avatar stand out.

✨ Why Join Us?

Original Designs: Unique accessories you won't find anywhere else.

Top Quality: Detailed textures and perfect fitting for all avatars.

Frequent Drops: New items added regularly!
